_meta.source: statistical subset of the CF Conventions cell_methods vocabulary; no upstream refresh

entries.name: point
entries.description: Instantaneous sampling; no aggregation over the interval.

entries.name: mean
entries.description: Arithmetic mean over the aggregation interval.

entries.name: maximum
entries.description: Maximum value within the aggregation interval.

entries.name: minimum
entries.description: Minimum value within the aggregation interval.

entries.name: median
entries.description: Median value within the aggregation interval.

entries.name: mode
entries.description: Most frequent value within the aggregation interval.

entries.name: mid_range
entries.description: Average of the maximum and minimum within the aggregation interval.

entries.name: variance
entries.description: Variance of values within the aggregation interval.

entries.name: standard_deviation
entries.description: Standard deviation of values within the aggregation interval.

entries.name: range
entries.description: Maximum minus minimum within the aggregation interval.
